name: GameLinked
oneLine: LMG's weekly gaming-news channel, the gaming-focused sibling of TechLinked.
bio: GameLinked is a Linus Media Group channel delivering weekly gaming-industry news, billed as 'TechLinked's gaming-obsessed little brother.' The channel went on indefinite hiatus on November 14, 2024, alongside Mac Address and Techquickie, but resumed weekly uploads on January 29, 2026. It covers video game industry happenings rather than hardware reviews.
style: TechLinked-style fast-cut news desk reads dedicated to games industry stories
notable: November 2024 hiatus alongside Mac Address and Techquickie
'So, about that Gaming Channel...' announcement video
